chains.description: 1-1/4" pitch ANSI roller chain for heavy-duty power transmission.
ANSI 100 duplex roller chain. Transverse pitch 1.500". Heavy multi-strand for paper, steel, and high-power drives.
ANSI 100 triplex roller chain for maximum 1-1/4" pitch drive capacity.
ANSI 100 lube-free chain with oil-impregnated bushings. For 1-1/4" pitch drives in difficult-to-access locations.
Heavy series 1-1/4" ANSI roller chain with thicker sidebars for heavy industrial drives.
1-1/2" pitch ANSI roller chain for high-load drives.
ANSI 120 duplex roller chain. High-load 1-1/2" pitch double strand for demanding industrial machinery.
Heavy series 1-1/2" ANSI roller chain.
1-3/4" pitch ANSI roller chain for very heavy industrial drives.
Heavy series 1-3/4" ANSI roller chain.
2" pitch ANSI roller chain for very heavy-duty industrial drives.
ANSI 160 duplex roller chain for very high-load drives. 2" pitch double strand.
Heavy series 2" ANSI roller chain for maximum industrial drive loads.
2-1/4" pitch ANSI roller chain for very high-load industrial drives. Confirmed from Allied-Locke official catalog.

performance_tiers.notes: Confirmed from Allied-Locke live catalog.

chains.description: 2-1/2" pitch ANSI roller chain for extreme-load industrial drives. Confirmed from Allied-Locke official catalog.

performance_tiers.notes: Confirmed from Allied-Locke live catalog.

chains.description: 3" pitch ANSI roller chain. Heaviest standard ANSI series for maximum load drives.
Smallest standard ANSI roller chain. Light duty power transmission. Single strand.
3/8" pitch standard ANSI roller chain. Common in light industrial and packaging.
1/2" pitch ANSI roller chain. Extremely common general-purpose drive chain. Available in standard, heavy, self-lube, stainless, nickel, and Super Series.

performance_tiers.notes: Shot peened, ball-drifted
Oil-impregnated bushings, extended lube intervals

source_refs.notes: A1 attachment, Donghua standard attachment chain
K1 attachment, Donghua standard attachment chain

chains.description: ANSI 40 duplex (double strand) roller chain. Provides approximately 2× single-strand capacity in the same pitch. Transverse pitch 0.566".

performance_tiers.notes: 2-strand: approx 1.9× single-strand tensile (joint efficiency).

chains.description: ANSI 40 triplex (triple strand) roller chain. ~2.8× single-strand capacity. Used where space is limited but power demand is high.

performance_tiers.notes: 3-strand: approx 2.8× single.

chains.description: Allied-Locke Armor Coat ANSI 40 — proprietary black zinc phosphate + polymer barrier coating. Excellent corrosion resistance for outdoor, agricultural, and light marine applications at lower cost than stainless. RoHS compliant.

performance_tiers.notes: ArmorCoat: >200hr salt spray. No tensile penalty. Cost-effective corrosion protection vs SS.

chains.description: ANSI 40 food-grade roller chain. Bright stainless steel construction or nickel-plated with NSF H1 food-grade lubricant. Suitable for food processing zones. FDA/NSF compliant.

performance_tiers.notes: Food-grade: NSF H1 lubricant, stainless or nickel plated chain body. Slightly lower tensile for SS variant.

chains.display_name: ANSI 40 Iwis Inox Full Stainless Roller Chain
chains.description: Iwis 'inox' fully stainless ANSI 40 chain. All components 304SS or 316SS. Premium stainless for food, pharmaceutical, marine, and chemical applications. Better construction tolerance than generic SS chains.

performance_tiers.notes: Inox: ~10% lower tensile than carbon steel. 316SS upgrade available for chloride environments.

chains.display_name: ANSI 40 iwis top Premium Roller Chain
chains.description: Iwis 'top' premium ANSI 40 chain. Shot-peened plates, precision-bored bushings, case-hardened pins. Superior fatigue life vs DIN/ANSI standard. Premium European-manufactured chain, common in precision machinery and packaging equipment.

specs.construction: Iwis top: shot peened, precision bore, case-hardened pin

performance_tiers.notes: Iwis top: ~20% higher tensile vs standard, precision tolerances. DIN/ANSI interchangeable.

source_refs.notes: Iwis top premium series. Munich, Germany manufactured.

chains.description: Tsubaki Neptune series ANSI 40 chain. All surfaces coated with proprietary nickel + zinc compound. Salt spray resistance >500 hours. For marine, food, chemical, and outdoor applications requiring corrosion protection without full stainless cost.

performance_tiers.notes: Neptune: >500hr salt spray. RoHS compliant. Same tensile as standard. Lower cost than SS.

source_refs.notes: Tsubaki Neptune corrosion-resistant series. Proprietary Ni+Zn coating.

chains.description: ANSI 40 O-ring sealed roller chain. Rubber O-rings retain pre-packed grease in pin-bushing interface. Superior performance in wet, dusty, and outdoor environments. 2-3× longer wear life vs standard. Common in ATV, motorcycle, and outdoor equipment.

performance_tiers.notes: O-ring sealed: 2-3× wear life in contaminated environments. Slightly higher friction than standard.

chains.description: Rexnord Rex-Plus ANSI 40 — premium shot-peened, carburized, and isotropic superfinished chain. Up to 30% higher fatigue strength than standard. ANSI-interchangeable. Used in precision packaging and high-speed drives.

performance_tiers.notes: Rex-Plus: 30% higher fatigue. Isotropic superfinished rollers reduce friction and noise.

chains.description: ANSI 40 rollerless (bushed) chain — outer roller removed. Runs on bushing directly against sprocket teeth. Lighter weight, lower cost. Used in slat conveyors, guided conveyor tracks, and applications where rollers are not needed.

performance_tiers.notes: Rollerless — approx 10-15% lower tensile than rollered chain. Not suitable for high-speed sprocket engagement.

chains.description: ANSI 40 chain with oil-impregnated sintered metal bushings. Lubricant is released under load and heat. Ideal for food-adjacent, clean-room, or hard-to-access applications. Extends re-lubrication intervals 3-5× vs standard.

performance_tiers.notes: Same tensile as standard 40. Lube intervals 3-5× longer. Operating temp max 120°C.

chains.description: ANSI 40 chain with solid (non-hollow) outer roller. Solid roller provides greater impact resistance and extended wear life in heavily loaded or shock-load applications.

performance_tiers.notes: Solid roller: impact and shock load resistance significantly better than standard hollow-roller chain.

chains.description: Heavy series 1/2" pitch ANSI roller chain with thicker sidebar plates for higher loads.
1/2" pitch narrow-series ANSI roller chain. Narrower inner width (0.250") than #40. Common in light-duty and some agricultural equipment.

performance_tiers.notes: Confirmed from Allied-Locke live catalog. Specification varies by manufacturer.

chains.description: 5/8" pitch ANSI roller chain for medium-duty power transmission.
ANSI 50 duplex roller chain. Transverse pitch 0.713". ~2× capacity of simplex 50.
ANSI 50 self-lubricating chain with oil-impregnated sintered bushings. Extended maintenance intervals for clean-room and hard-to-access applications.
Heavy series 5/8" ANSI roller chain with thicker sidebar plates for higher load applications.
3/4" pitch ANSI roller chain. Heavy-duty power transmission. Common in agricultural, industrial, and conveying applications.
ANSI 60 duplex roller chain. Transverse pitch 0.897". For high-load drives where simplex is insufficient.
ANSI 60 triplex roller chain. ~2.8× simplex capacity. Common in agricultural drives, combine power-takeoff systems.
Allied-Locke Armor Coat ANSI 60 chain. Black zinc phosphate + polymer barrier for outdoor and agricultural use.
ANSI 60 food-grade chain with NSF H1 lubricant. Stainless or nickel construction for food processing zones. FDA/NSF compliant.

performance_tiers.notes: Food-grade NSF H1.

chains.description: Tsubaki GT4 Winner Series ANSI 60 — highest performance standard-pitch roller chain from Tsubaki. Proprietary heat treatment, shot peening, ball drifting, and optimized plate geometry. Up to 10× wear life vs standard. Used in high-speed, high-cycle precision drives.

specs.construction: GT4 Winner: shot peened + ball drifted + heat treated plates

performance_tiers.notes: GT4 Winner: up to 10× wear life vs standard ANSI 60. Peak fatigue 25% higher than standard.

source_refs.notes: Tsubaki GT4 Winner. Premium precision roller chain series.

chains.description: ANSI 60 O-ring chain. O-ring seals retain pre-packed grease. Used in outdoor agricultural, construction, and marine drive applications.

performance_tiers.notes: O-ring sealed.

chains.description: ANSI 60 rollerless (bushed) chain. No outer roller — bushing contacts sprocket/track directly. Slat conveyors, guided tracks.
ANSI 60 self-lubricating chain. Oil-impregnated sintered bushings. Used in beverage, food processing, and pharmaceutical equipment where external lubrication is problematic.

performance_tiers.notes: Same tensile as standard 60. Operating temp limit 120°C continuous.

chains.description: Heavy series 3/4" ANSI roller chain with heavier sidebar plates.
1" pitch ANSI roller chain. Industry workhorse for heavy power transmission, industrial drives, and agricultural equipment.

performance_tiers.notes: Shot peened, ball-drifted, induction hardened
Lube-free, extended maintenance intervals

chains.description: ANSI 80 duplex roller chain. Transverse pitch 1.138". Industry workhorse in heavy multi-strand power transmission.
ANSI 80 triplex roller chain. Very high load capacity for heavy industrial drives — paper mills, steel mills, mining equipment.
ANSI 80 quadruplex (4-strand) roller chain. Maximum multi-strand compact drive. Used in paper mill drives, crane hoists, and heavy transfer equipment.

performance_tiers.notes: 4-strand: ~3.7× single-strand. Requires precision alignment.

chains.description: Allied-Locke Armor Coat ANSI 80 chain. Most popular Armor Coat size. Black zinc phosphate + polymer barrier. For outdoor equipment, agricultural drives, and light marine.
ANSI 80 food-grade chain — most common food-grade 1" chain for conveyors in meat processing, dairy, and beverage plants. NSF H1 lubricated.

performance_tiers.notes: Food-grade 80. NSF H1.

chains.description: Tsubaki GT4 Winner ANSI 80 — premium performance chain with shot peened, ball drifted, heat treated construction. Up to 10× wear life. Highest-performance ANSI-interchangeable 1" chain.

specs.construction: GT4 Winner: SP + ball drift + heat treat

performance_tiers.notes: Up to 10× wear life. Most premium ANSI-interchangeable 1" chain on market.

chains.display_name: ANSI 80 Iwis Inox Full Stainless Roller Chain
chains.description: Iwis 'inox' fully stainless ANSI 80 chain — most popular size. 304SS or 316SS all components. Used in food processing, dairy, beverage, pharmaceutical, and marine drives.

performance_tiers.notes: Inox 80: most common iwis stainless 1" size.

chains.display_name: ANSI 80 iwis top Premium Roller Chain
chains.description: Iwis 'top' premium ANSI 80 chain. Shot-peened, precision-bored, case-hardened. Superior fatigue and wear life. Most popular iwis premium size for 1" industrial drives.

specs.construction: Iwis top: shot peened + precision + case-hardened

performance_tiers.notes: Iwis top ANSI 80: ~20% higher tensile. ANSI/DIN interchangeable.

chains.description: Tsubaki Neptune ANSI 80 — most popular Neptune size. Ni+Zn composite coating, >500hr salt spray, RoHS compliant. Used in food processing, marine, and outdoor industrial drives.

performance_tiers.notes: Same dimensions as ANSI 80. No tensile sacrifice. Most popular Neptune SKU.

source_refs.notes: Tsubaki Neptune ANSI 80. See Tsubaki Americas catalog.

chains.description: ANSI 80 O-ring sealed roller chain. Pre-packed grease, rubber O-ring seals. For harsh outdoor, construction, and logging equipment applications.

performance_tiers.notes: O-ring sealed: extended wear life, reduced re-lubrication.

chains.description: Rexnord Rex-Plus ANSI 80 — carburized, shot peened, superfinished. 30% higher fatigue than standard ANSI 80. Most popular Rexnord premium 1" roller chain.

performance_tiers.notes: Rex-Plus ANSI 80: 30% fatigue improvement. Superfinished for low noise and long life.

chains.description: ANSI 80 rollerless (bushed) chain. Common in flight conveyor systems where rollers are not required.
ANSI 80 self-lubricating chain with oil-impregnated sintered bushings. Tsubaki Lambda #80 is the most widely specified lube-free 1" chain in North America.

performance_tiers.notes: Lambda: rated 3-5× standard chain lube intervals. Most popular lube-free 1" chain.

chains.description: ANSI 80 chain with solid outer roller. Maximum impact and wear resistance for heavy shock-load industrial drives.

performance_tiers.notes: Solid roller — superior shock load resistance.

chains.description: Heavy series 1" pitch ANSI roller chain. Thicker sidebars, higher fatigue rating.
6mm pitch British Standard roller chain. Light duty. ISO 606 compliant.
8mm pitch British Standard roller chain. ISO 606 compliant.
3/8" pitch British Standard roller chain. ISO 606 compliant. Common in European industrial equipment.
1/2" pitch British Standard roller chain — equivalent to ANSI 40 in pitch but different dimensions.

chains.display_name: 08B-2 Double Strand British Standard Roller Chain
chains.description: Double strand 08B British Standard roller chain. 2× single-strand tensile for compact multi-strand drives. Common in European machinery, food processing equipment, and agricultural drives.

performance_tiers.notes: Double strand 08B-2. Transverse pitch 13.92mm per ISO 606.

chains.description: 5/8" pitch British Standard roller chain.
3/4" pitch British Standard roller chain — ISO equivalent to ANSI 60.
3/4" pitch British Standard roller chain. BS/ISO equivalent to ANSI 60 in pitch but with different geometry.
1" pitch British Standard roller chain — ISO equivalent to ANSI 80.
1" pitch British Standard roller chain. Higher tensile than ANSI 80 equivalent. Common in European heavy industrial drives.

chains.display_name: 16B-2 Double Strand British Standard Roller Chain
chains.description: Double strand 16B British Standard roller chain. High-load compact European drives. Very common in agricultural machinery, mining equipment, and heavy industrial drives.
1-1/4" pitch British Standard roller chain — ISO equivalent to ANSI 100.
1-1/4" pitch British Standard roller chain for heavy-duty European drives.
1-1/2" pitch BS/ISO heavy industrial roller chain.
1-3/4" pitch BS/ISO roller chain for high-load European industrial drives.
2" pitch BS/ISO roller chain — heavy European industrial drives.
2-1/2" pitch BS/ISO heavy roller chain for maximum load European drives.
ANSI 120 cottered-type roller chain — 1.5" pitch with cotter pin assembly for field serviceability. Heavy machinery and crane drives.
ANSI 160 cottered-type roller chain — 2" pitch. Heavy-duty field-serviceable chain for cranes, steel mill equipment, and large industrial drives.
ANSI 80 cottered-type roller chain — cotter pins instead of press-fit rivets allow field disassembly without special tools. Used on heavy machinery, cranes, and equipment requiring frequent service.

performance_tiers.notes: Cottered type — cotter pins allow field disassembly. Same tensile as standard 80.

chains.description: Donghua ANSI 60 Dacromet-coated chain. Excellent salt spray resistance (>500 hrs). RoHS compliant. No hydrogen embrittlement risk. Used in marine, outdoor, and high-humidity environments.

performance_tiers.notes: Dacromet coating — RoHS, no H embrittlement. Specification varies by manufacturer.

chains.description: Donghua ANSI 40 nickel-plated roller chain. Improved corrosion resistance over zinc. Bright finish for food-adjacent and packaging applications.

performance_tiers.notes: Nickel plated. Near-standard tensile strength. Specification varies by manufacturer.

chains.description: Donghua ANSI 80 nickel-plated chain. Enhanced corrosion resistance, near-standard tensile.

performance_tiers.notes: Nickel plated 80. Specification varies by manufacturer.

chains.display_name: 100SH Donghua High Strength Heavy Duty Chain
chains.description: Donghua SH Series 1-1/4" chain — shot peened + heavy duty. Premium fatigue rated for high-cycle drives.

chains.display_name: 60SH Donghua High Strength Heavy Duty Chain
chains.description: Donghua SH Series 3/4" chain — shot peened (SP processing) + heavy duty sidebar plates. Premium fatigue resistance plus higher tensile than standard. Best-in-class Donghua performance chain.

performance_tiers.notes: SH = SP shot peening + Heavy duty plates. 40-50% higher fatigue vs standard ANSI 60.

chains.display_name: 80SH Donghua High Strength Heavy Duty Chain
chains.description: Donghua SH Series 1" chain — SP + heavy duty. Maximum performance ANSI-interchangeable roller chain for high-cycle, high-load drives.

performance_tiers.notes: SH series — best Donghua performance tier. 40-50% higher fatigue than standard ANSI 80.

chains.description: Donghua SP Series 1/2" chain — shot peened, optimized plate geometry. 25-40% higher fatigue strength vs standard #40. ANSI interchangeable.

performance_tiers.notes: SP series shot peened. 25-40% higher fatigue than standard. ANSI interchangeable.

chains.description: Donghua SP Series 3/4" chain — shot peened, 25-40% higher fatigue. ANSI interchangeable.

performance_tiers.notes: SP series shot peened.

chains.description: Donghua SP Series 1" chain — shot peened plates, 25-40% higher fatigue than standard. ANSI interchangeable.

performance_tiers.notes: SP series shot peened. 25-40% higher fatigue than standard ANSI 80.

chains.description: Donghua X3 Series 1/2" chain — enhanced surface hardness, extended wear life, high-cycle fatigue rated. Premium ANSI-interchangeable chain.

performance_tiers.notes: X3 Series — enhanced hardness, extended wear life.

chains.description: Donghua X3 Series 1" chain — premium surface hardness, wear resistance, extended fatigue life.

performance_tiers.notes: X3 Series — enhanced hardness, extended wear life.

chains.description: Donghua ANSI 40 zinc-plated roller chain. Moderate corrosion resistance for outdoor storage conveyors, farm equipment, and general industrial applications. RoHS compliant.

performance_tiers.notes: Zinc plated. Salt spray >200 hrs. Approx 5% tensile reduction vs carbon steel. Specification varies by manufacturer.

chains.description: 1/2" pitch side bow (laterally flexible) roller chain. Allows horizontal curves and S-curve conveyors. Used in packaging, bottling, and printing equipment.

performance_tiers.notes: Side bow — laterally flexible for curved conveyor paths.

chains.description: 3/4" side bow roller chain for curved horizontal conveyor paths.
1" side bow roller chain for curved conveyor paths requiring higher load capacity.
BS/ISO 08B fully stainless roller chain (304SS) for European corrosive applications.

performance_tiers.notes: 304SS ISO 606. Specification varies by manufacturer.

chains.description: BS/ISO 12B fully stainless steel (304SS) roller chain. 3/4" pitch corrosion-resistant chain for European food processing, chemical, and pharmaceutical applications.

performance_tiers.notes: 304SS 12B. ~10% tensile reduction vs carbon steel 12B. Specification varies by manufacturer.

chains.description: BS/ISO 16B fully stainless steel (304SS) roller chain. 1" pitch for European heavy-duty corrosion-resistant drives in food, chemical, and marine applications.

performance_tiers.notes: 304SS 16B. Specification varies by manufacturer.

chains.description: ANSI 25 fully stainless steel roller chain (304SS). Corrosion resistant for food, beverage, and chemical environments.

performance_tiers.notes: 304SS — approx 10-15% lower tensile than carbon steel equivalent. Specification varies by manufacturer.

chains.description: ANSI 40 fully stainless steel roller chain (304SS). Food/beverage, chemical, and pharmaceutical conveying.

performance_tiers.notes: 304SS — approx 5-10% lower tensile. Specification varies by manufacturer.

performance_tiers.notes: 304SS. Specification varies by manufacturer.
